title: Enjoy the rally. What can possibly go wrong?
section_path: Enjoy the rally. What can possibly go wrong?
section_path_text: Enjoy the rally. What can possibly go wrong?
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
The US economy is still growing at a healthy pace, but slightly slower than anticipated. This has allowed investors to price in more rate cuts this year, and drive a bond and equity rally in the last few days. While the Fed keeps mum, we don't see any of the usual hallmarks of irrational exuberance.

[Page 1]
EARNINGS INSIGHT
John Butters Media Questions/Requests
VP, Senior Earnings Analyst media_request@factset.com
jbutters@factset.com
May 17, 2024
Key Metrics
 Earnings Scorecard: For Q1 2024 (with 93% of S&P 500 companies reporting actual results), 78% of S&P 500
companies have reported a positive EPS surprise and 60% of S&P 500 companies have reported a positive revenue
surprise.  Earnings Growth: For Q1 2024, the blended (year-over-year) earnings growth rate for the S&P 500 is 5.7%.
